description: This Sahiwal cow is known for its excellent meat quality and strong physique. It has been raised with proper nutrition and care, ensuring good health. The animal is calm, well-trained, and ideal for those looking for a premium Qurbani option.

description: This Friesian cross cow is a large and healthy animal with a strong build. It has been properly vaccinated and maintained under hygienic conditions. The cow offers both good meat yield and strong overall health, making it a great choice for buyers.
